scripts.dev:api: cd apps/server && uv run python run.py
scripts.train: cd apps/server && uv run python -m services.train_models
scripts.db:revision: cd apps/server && uv run alembic revision --autogenerate
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/server && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:downgrade: cd apps/server && uv run alembic downgrade -1
scripts.db:current: cd apps/server && uv run alembic current
scripts.db:history: cd apps/server && uv run alembic history
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/server && uv run ruff check
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:web
scripts.format:api: cd apps/server && uv run ruff format
scripts.format: npm run format:api && npm run format:web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:api && npm run typecheck:web
